meta.title: Borderless Studio — NL↔PL Web Design Agency | Websites Without Borders
meta.desc: Web design agency from the Netherlands for Polish and Dutch businesses. Fast, multilingual websites. NL · PL · EN · DE. Based in Limburg, working worldwide.

hero.tag: NL ↔ PL · Web design without borders
hero.title: Websites that cross borders. Built for Dutch and Polish businesses.
hero.desc: We design and build fast, multilingual websites that open new markets. Dutch quality, Polish roots — live in days, not weeks.
hero.secondary: Free quote in 24h — no strings attached

landing.selling1_desc: We live and breathe NL↔PL. Your website speaks to both markets natively — not through machine translation.
landing.selling2_desc: No bloated CMS, no endless back-and-forth. We deliver polished, SEO-ready sites in 3-5 working days.
landing.selling3_desc: Design, development, SEO, hosting, multi-language, GDPR compliance. One price, one team, zero headaches.
landing.cta_title: Your website without borders starts here
landing.cta_text: Tell us about your project. We'll get back with a concrete proposal within 24 hours.

case1.title: SparkleWash
case1.desc: Full website design & development for a professional upholstery cleaning business. Multi-language (NL/DE/EN/PL), price calculator, before/after gallery, SEO, hosting, Google Maps integration. Launched in 3 days.

case2.title: Lief Schoon
case2.desc: Multi-language landing page for a cleaning business in Heerlen. Design, development, SEO, cookie consent, contact form, hosting. NL · EN · PL. Built in 2 days.

case3.title: Your Business Here
case3.desc: Got a business in the Netherlands or Poland? Let's build something that works across borders. Website, SEO, multi-language — we handle it all.

services.title: What we do
services.subtitle: Three core services. Done exceptionally well.
services.intro: We focus on what matters: getting your business online, visible, and working for you — across borders.

websites.title: Web Design & Development
websites.desc: Lightning-fast, multilingual websites. Pure HTML/CSS — no bloated CMS. Custom design, mobile-first, accessible. SEO-ready and GDPR-proof from day one.

marketing.title: Digital Marketing & SEO
marketing.desc: Getting found is as important as looking good. We optimize your online presence so customers find you first.
items: Local SEO for your city / region

automation.title: Automation & Hosting
automation.desc: From automatic backups to lead generation. We handle the tech so you can focus on your business.

about.title: About Borderless Studio
about.subtitle: Web design agency from Limburg, NL
about.intro: We're a small, focused team bridging Dutch and Polish markets through smart web design.
about.story: Borderless Studio was born from a simple observation: Polish entrepreneurs in the Netherlands struggle to find web designers who understand both cultures. Dutch agencies don't get the Polish market. Polish freelancers don't understand Dutch business expectations. We're the bridge — a team that speaks both languages (literally and culturally) and builds websites that work across borders.
about.approach: No bloated processes. No account managers you'll never meet. You talk directly to the people building your site. We scope together, design fast, deliver in days. Every project gets a dedicated timeline and transparent pricing — you always know what's happening and when.

contact.title: Let's talk
contact.subtitle: No sales pitch. Just tell us what you need.
contact.name: Name
contact.success: Got it! We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Try emailing us directly at hello@borderless.studio.

cookie.text: This site uses only functional cookies. No tracking, no ads.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: GDPR / AVG Statement
privacy.intro: Borderless Studio values your privacy. Here's how we handle your data.

what.title: What we collect
what.desc: Through our contact form: name, email, and your message. That's it.

purpose.title: Why we collect it
purpose.desc: Solely to respond to your inquiry. Your data is never used for marketing without consent.

sharing.title: Third parties
sharing.desc: None. Your data stays with us. No selling, no sharing, no renting.

storage.title: Storage
storage.desc: Your message is stored in our business mailbox and deleted when no longer needed.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.desc: View, modify, or delete your data anytime. Email hello@borderless.studio — we reply within 30 days.
